title: Better MC [ PACK ]
description: BMC Mod-Pack: is an enhanced version of Minecraft that includes the [Better Minecraft Mod], created by our team. We hope to breathe new life into Minecraft.
body:
![BMCMOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8c8838d8e3ee059e9d097c508a6fb83c2172b46.png)

## 💫Introduction
Discover a whole new universe in the world of AELORIA, explore the many biomes, face new bosses, compete with other players with your trophies and create your own universe.
Your goals are your own, ours is simple: keep the server alive, create nations, laws, villages with your technologies, your practices.

![Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f9bfd754ff50d3cd6da7cc1a1e59b5929aa302c.png)

✔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

✔️ New Bosses and Mobs

✔️ Overhauled Stronghold & 

✔️ Technology without distorting Minecraft

✔️ Optimized for small configurations

✔️ 6 GB ram minimum

✔️ Mods in perpetual evolution

✔️ Season with different themes

✔️ +100 Mods !!

✔️ Many Custom Features for an Improved Experience

### Conclusion
Join our discord now and play with several people on our adventures create your story build the world of AELORIA
